description_long: This vending machine is a tall, rectangular unit with a prominent blue and white color scheme. The front features multiple shelves stocked with cylindrical cans, likely for dispensing powdered milk or formula, and a large branded display at the top with an image of a parent and child. The upper section includes a decorative geometric pattern and Chinese text, suggesting a product targeted at families or children. The sides and back are solid blue, with no visible openings or interactive elements. The machine appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with a glossy finish on the exterior. The overall design is clean and modern, with clear branding and product visibility.
description: A tall, blue and white vending machine with shelves of cans, a large branded display, and a modern, glossy finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows the vending machine's open shelves filled with cans, a large branded display with an image and text, and decorative elements at the top.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a solid blue panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain, uninterrupted blue surface, indicating no access or interactive parts from the back.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a solid blue panel with no visible features.
attribute_display_panel: A large, rectangular display panel is located at the top front, featuring printed graphics of a parent and child, product branding, and decorative elements.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Prominent branding is present at the top front, including the Enfinitar logo, Chinese text, and a decorative geometric pattern in blue and white.
